output_text:
enum RideStatus {
  REQUESTED
  MATCHED
  IN_PROGRESS
  COMPLETED
  CANCELLED
}

model Driver {
  id: String @id
  name: String
  phone: String
  location: Location
  vehicleId: String? @unique
}

model Rider {
  id: String @id
  name: String
  phone: String
  location: Location
}

model Vehicle {
  id: String @id
  make: String
  model: String
  licensePlate: String @unique
  driverId: String? @unique
}

model Ride {
  id: String @id
  riderId: String
  driverId: String?
  vehicleId: String?
  origin: Location
  destination: Location
  status: RideStatus @default(REQUESTED)
  createdAt: DateTime @createdAt
  updatedAt: DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Location {
  latitude: Float
  longitude: Float
}

service RideService {
  requestRide(riderId: String, origin: Location, destination: Location): Ride
  matchDriver(rideId: String, driverId: String): Ride
  completeRide(rideId: String): Ride
  cancelRide(rideId: String): Ride
}

output_text:
enum ArticleStatus {
  DRAFT
  PUBLISHED
  ARCHIVED
}

type Author {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  email: String!
  bio: String?
}

type Article {
  id: ID!
  title: String!
  content: String!
  status: ArticleStatus!
  author: Author!
  createdAt: DateTime!
  updatedAt: DateTime?
  publishedAt: DateTime?
}

type Comment {
  id: ID!
  content: String!
  author: Author!
  article: Article!
  createdAt: DateTime!
}

type Like {
  id: ID!
  author: Author!
  article: Article!
  createdAt: DateTime!
}

service BlogService {
  createDraft(authorId: ID!, title: String!, content: String!): Article!
  publishArticle(articleId: ID!): Article!
  addComment(articleId: ID!, authorId: ID!, content: String!): Comment!
  listComments(articleId: ID!): [Comment!]!
  likeArticle(articleId: ID!, authorId: ID!): Like!
}
